svg.text: Neovim GUI Frontend --- Inheritance (hollow arrow) / Composition (filled arrow, dashed)

g.text: Main loop: SDL events -> nvim RPC -> Grid -> Renderer
Owns all subsystems below | implements IHostCallbacks
Main thread: SDL events + nvim/PTY message processing + grid mutation + GPU rendering
Reader thread: blocking reads from nvim stdout | Scanner thread: background tree-sitter codebase scan
Grid thread: CityGrid built on background thread after layout completes, published via mutex
